goal: Use Loop to repair the DEV-016 verifier test failure in the existing DEV-016 worktree without changing the business scope. The known failure is npm run test: apps/api/src/access.test.ts still expects seed-dev-015 while DEV-016 correctly updates permission policy output to seed-dev-016 and adds AI permissions. Repair only what is needed, keep DEV-016 AI Framework Center and AI Run productionization behavior intact, update DEV-016/AUDIT-016 verification status if needed, and rerun gates.
acceptance: Repair is executed through the codex_executor connector in the existing DEV-016 isolated worktree, not by manual chat edits.
The repair is limited to the known access.test.ts expectation mismatch unless verification exposes a directly related regression.

DEV-016 behavior remains intact: AI Framework, Framework Version, AI Run, input/output snapshots, source evidence, adoption/rejection/change records, failure classification, retry policy metadata, permissions, audit records, migrations, frontend evidence/config surfaces, and project memory.
AI remains unable to approve, reject, return, transfer, add-sign, publish knowledge, create official tasks, sign, pay, or confirm execution without human confirmation.
Frontend remains inside existing menus only and keeps the single 1440 desktop workspace target.
Run and pass git diff --check, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run test, npm run build, npm run smoke:api, and npm audit --audit-level=low.
If any gate fails, classify the failure, repair up to Loop retry limits, or write intent debt/repair queue if unresolved.
